title: FastCI Configuration
description: Configuration file for FastCI CI acceleration tool. Place as fastci.config.json in your repository root.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE autocomplete and validation.

accept_terms.description: Accept the FastCI Beta Agreement. Set to "yes" to accept. Required for non-JFrog organizations.

branches.description: Branch monitoring configuration. By default all branches are monitored.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for branches FastCI should skip entirely. Example: ["dependabot/*", "renovate/*"]

optimizations.description: Optimization configuration. By default all optimizations are enabled.

exclude.description: Technologies to disable optimizations for. Available: go, docker, gradle, python, npm, cargo

create_issues.description: Whether to create GitHub issues from detected CI insights. Defaults to true.
